bugs.error_message: QA: dusty box hotspot (archive.js) at x74-98 y124-146 mismatched drawn box at x228-262 y150-172 — clicking visible box did nothing
bugs.root_cause: Hotspot rect for ארגז מאובק did not match the bg drawing rect defined in archive_bg.js layout contract
bugs.fix: Changed hotspot to x:228,y:150,w:34,h:22,wx:224 to match the drawn box on the floor

bugs.error_message: QA: glowing eyes drawn at (243,97) but עיניים זוהרות hotspot is x208-234 y66-84 — visible eyes fell through to generic darkness line
bugs.root_cause: Dark-state eye pixels drawn outside the hotspot rect defined in archive.js
bugs.fix: Moved eyes to (216,72)/(223,72) with greenD pupils at (217,73)/(224,73), inside the hotspot rect

bugs.error_message: QA: clicking visible cactus does nothing; cactus hotspot (x246-260 y132-150) hit the fallen chair instead
bugs.root_cause: bg drew cactus at x293-309 y122-154 while meeting.js hotspot is x246-260 y132-150
bugs.fix: redrew cactus inside x246-260 y132-150 (pot base y148-150) + updated header layout-contract comment

bugs.error_message: QA: fallen chair (x240-264 y146-157) sat inside the cactus hotspot rect
bugs.root_cause: decorative chair overlapped hotspot x246-260 y132-150, so the click target read as a chair
bugs.fix: moved fallen chair to x272-300 y146-157 and moved its baseboard shadow under it

bugs.error_message: QA: remote drawn forever — screen contradicts מקום השלט dust-outline narration after batteries taken
bugs.root_cause: remote pixels drawn unconditionally, ignoring G.has(batteries)/G.f.flash_ok state
bugs.fix: wrapped remote draw in typeof G guard matching meeting.js visible(); else-branch draws PAL.gray4 dust outline (roof_bg.js got2 pattern)

bugs.error_message: QA: 'קלסר 22' hotspot unclickable — nested inside 'מדפי הקלסרים' rect but placed earlier in array; engine hotspotsAt returns LAST matching hotspot, so shelves always won. page3 unobtainable, game uncompletable.
bugs.root_cause: Hotspot array order: smaller nested rect (binder 22) came before the larger containing rect (shelves); engine.js hotspotsAt iterates from end of array.
bugs.fix: Moved the 'קלסר 22' hotspot object to AFTER 'מדפי הקלסרים' in the hotspots array (same rule as the dark layer), added explanatory Hebrew comment.

bugs.error_message: Rivka's 0-pages hint contained 'והעמדתי מודיעה' — not a Hebrew word, garbled clue pointing player to archive

bugs.fix: Rewrote 21→3 lines (14 removed)

bugs.error_message: Roof intro replays with invisible pigeon after reload (roofIntro session var vs autosaved pigeon_gone flag)
bugs.root_cause: enter guard checked only !roofIntro && !G.f.got2; after feeding Nachum + reload, pigeon_gone restores true but roofIntro resets false, so intro plays while npcs() returns []
bugs.fix: guard now also requires !G.f.pigeon_gone

bugs.error_message: Using tuna on nest hotspot fell through to generic 'זה לא עובד' though pigeon hotspot 1px above has a custom gag
bugs.root_cause: tuna handler existed only on pigeon hotspot; pigeon/nest rects overlap by 1px and pigeon sits visually on the nest
bugs.fix: extracted shared tunaOnNachum() and wired it into both pigeon and nest items (nest adds an empty-nest branch)

bugs.root_cause: Had 'מה?? מצאת סוללות?? עוד לא?? תחפש בשלטים!! סוללות
bugs.fix: Changed to 'מה?? מצאת סוללות?? עוד לא?? תחפש בשלטים!! סוללות

bugs.root_cause: Function uses await but wasn't declared async
bugs.fix: Added async modifier

bugs.root_cause: Had ' — ריק'
bugs.fix: Changed to ' — ריקה'

bugs.error_message: Clicking Gila in the lobby triggered the reception desk instead of her dialogue; items on her hit the desk (generic refusal)
bugs.root_cause: Gila's hotspot (x152-180,y112-156) was listed BEFORE the overlapping reception desk hotspot (x136-196,y104-146); engine hotspotsAt() iterates in reverse so later array entries win on overlap — desk shadowed most of her sprite
bugs.fix: Reordered lobby hotspots array so 'גילה מהקבלה' comes AFTER 'דלפק הקבלה' (and sofa); added comment in file explaining the reverse-iteration priority rule. Also added G.f.won guard to her use handler so post-win dialogue doesn't direct player to reassemble consumed pages

bugs.root_cause: No early return/throw for edge case: missing.includes('page2'
bugs.fix: Added guard clause: if (missing.includes('page2')

bugs.error_message: design.js: Yossi first-meeting intro (name question + Comic Sans quiz) replayed on every talk with 0 pages; light-table hotspot overlapped Yossi's head (x106-134 y112-120) so clicks/items there hit the table due to engine reverse-iteration priority; table had no page/article item handlers
bugs.root_cause: intro branch had no met-state guard; light-table rect (y50 h70) extended into Yossi's rect and later array index wins overlaps in hotspotsAt(); missing items:{} on the assembly-target hotspot
bugs.fix: module-level closure `let metYossi` gating the intro (not a G.f flag, whitelist intact); shrank table h:70→62; added items page1/page2/page3→pageOnTable redirect + article handler on the table
